name: good_m4_12_short_term_vs_long_term_bioethics
premise: Organ allocation exception criteria were invoked twice this month; ethics worries about precedent creep. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around short term vs long term bioethics has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Clinic Director Priya Nand
agents.identity: I am Clinic Director Priya Nand, the accountable executive on this bridge in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Pharmacist Theo Park
agents.identity: I am Pharmacist Theo Park, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so beneficence does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so autonomy does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Clinic Director Priya Nand must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Clinic Director Priya Nand do?
